articles.title: Morris mows through Essex to lift struggling Lancashire

articles.title: 'Felt like he could hit any ball anywhere' - Jofra Archer names toughest batter he has bowled against
articles.description: The pair have met in eight IPL innings, with Rahul holding a favourable record against Archer. He has scored 108 runs in 73 balls, striking at 147.94.

articles.title: Should CSK stick to Stephen Fleming as head coach?
articles.description: After a few underwhelming seasons, some fans and experts believe that it is time Chennai Super Kings shows the door to current head coach Stephen Fleming and brings someone else into the role.

articles.description: The other side of the deal sees wicketkeeper-batter Rishabh Pant make a sensational return to the capital, after two dismal years at the helm in Lucknow.
